message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class "plugin_translation\n((Translations))" <<I>> {
    label string
    description longText
    manufacturerLink string
    supportLink string
    changelog json
    customFields customFields
    createdAt createdAt
    updatedAt updatedAt
    pluginId foreignKey
    languageId foreignKey
}

class "plugin\n(Plugin)" <<T>> {
    id id
    baseClass string
    name string
    composerName string
    autoload json
    active bool
    managedByComposer bool
    path string
    author string
    copyright string
    license string
    version string
    upgradeVersion string
    installedAt date
    upgradedAt date
    iconRaw blob
    icon string
    label translated
    description translated
    manufacturerLink translated
    supportLink translated
    changelog translated
    customFields translated
    createdAt createdAt
    updatedAt updatedAt
    translated json
}

class "language" <<T>> 

class "payment_method" <<T>> 


' Relationships based on arrows in the original diagram
plugin --> payment_method : "" 
plugin_translation -down-> plugin : ""  
plugin_translation --|> language : ""  

@enduml
